# 04-third-party

Tracked reference notes about third-party tools: what a tool is, its licence, its source, and
its update cadence. Notes only — no third-party code is ever vendored here. Cloned source, when
a task genuinely needs it, goes to the git-ignored `.vendor/` directory on demand.

Rules for bringing in any third-party tool live in
[`../00-governance/third-party-repo-policy.md`](../00-governance/third-party-repo-policy.md).
Classification (adopt now, template only, watch, rejected) lives in
[`../01-catalogue/`](../01-catalogue/).

**Next:** check the catalogue before adding a note here.
